concept-direction sliders

Nearest objects (reverse-ridge partial-effect directions)

SigLIP2 Giant · selected tuned reverse-ridge checkpoint. Sliders are nonnegative concept coefficients (0–3). Load an item to see the positive part of its projection profile, then edit any axis and retrieve. Struck-through sliders = flagged degenerate axes. Green theme = trained adapter.
